chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 709 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.3431/2020 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Azad Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Learned counsel for respondent department submits that the impugned demand notices are being withdrawn forthwith subject to the right of the department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
